#comment: CTOV petshop tag — variant=snowy_igloo (Snowy igloo village variant (vanilla snowy, CTOV-styled)), marker=petshop_cage_3. Tropical bird cage — parrot-style mobs (DI: jungle/savanna). Override this tag via datapack to customize. Falls back to the matching domesticationinnovation:petstore_* tag when this list is empty or removed.
